name: iweb
description: Abdulkerims persönliche Website – modern, responsive und DSGVO-konform

scripts.check-links-local: npx serve -l 8000 & SERVER_PID=$!; for i in {1..15}; do if curl -s http://localhost:8000 > /dev/null; then break; fi; echo 'Warte auf Server... ('$i')'; sleep 1; done; npm run check-links; kill $SERVER_PID
scripts.check-links: linkinator http://localhost:8000 --exclude https://www.abdulkerimsesli.de/ --exclude https://www.abdulkerimsesli.de --exclude https://www.abdulkerimsesli.de --exclude https://www.abdulkerimsesli.de/*
scripts.deploy-check: npm run validate-html && npm run validate-css && npm run check-links
scripts.purge: mkdir -p css/purged && npx purgecss --css css/*.css --content pages/**/*.html js/**/*.js --output css/purged/

author: Abdulkerim
